meaning: adj.野蛮的,粗野的,毫无约束的,肆无忌惮的
examples: I think any sport involving harm to animals is barbaric and uncivilized.
Some of the critter's combat strategies seem barbaric or downright bizarre.
This barbaric treatment of animals has no place in any decent society.
He condemned the "barbaric attack, " gave his condolences and offered support for the investigation.
The camp, now a museum in Poland, has called the alleged theft an "unimaginably barbaric act".
